title: Jorge introductions — six Texas-host activities for visiting friend
html:
Jorge introductions — six Texas-host activities for visiting friend

Source: 2024-09-14 Apple Note. Six-item list of things to do with Jorge — likely a hosting menu for a friend visiting Texas (the items are unmistakably Texas-coded). Written from Shanghai but planning a future US-return hangout.

TL;DR

  • Six activities: fajitas, KKBQ (Korean BBQ?), swimming, Baskin Robbins, Top Golf, Harry Potter (probably Universal Studios in Orlando OR a Harry Potter movie marathon).
  • "Fajitas" + "KKBQ" point at Texas/Austin-style food culture — Jorge is probably a friend Yahir wanted to host once he relocated to Texas (or this is forward-planning for after China).
  • Written September 2024 from Shanghai mid-semester — fits the future-projecting / nostalgia-for-home mood that surfaces in other Sep–Oct China notes (2024 09 28 thoughts, 2024 09 26 top anime hype scene).
  • Jorge does not yet have an entity page — single explicit mention in the corpus so far. Stub-threshold: not met yet (one mention, no clear significance gate). Adding to potential-entities list for next encounter.

Pattern

Hosting-menu notes are an exteriorization of friendship. He builds activity lists for specific people (cf. Chengdu activities for traveling friends).

Open questions

  • Who is Jorge — high-school friend, college friend, Austin-orbit?
  • "KKBQ" — Korean BBQ chain, or a specific Texas spot?
  • Is "Harry Potter" the theme park, the movies, or a specific Austin venue (Alamo Drafthouse marathon)?
